column1: Fountain City was originally called Holmes' Landing
column3: who settled there in 1839.[5] Boats would stop at the landing to take on firewood
column4: as well as water from springs not far from the river
column5: leading to the name of Fountain City.

column1: This file is a human and machine readable equivalent of the layer Winona exported from the ESRI personal geodatabase test.gdb and was generated to back up and archive the parent dataset for posterity in a non-proprietary text format in case the parent geodatabase format should become unsupported or outmoded. This file was not intended for day to day analytical work. Where possibe use the parent geodatabase.
Note: Row field values are separated by a pipe character | to avoid software confusion with the commas commonly found in WKT representations of geometry.
